properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v5 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I can't count the times I've called Your name some broken night And You showed up and patched me up like You do every time I get amnesia, I forget that You keep coming around Yeah, ain't no way You'll ever let me down (me down)

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Good God almighty I hope You'll find me Praising Your name no matter what comes 'Cause I know where I'd be without Your mercy So I keep praising Your name at the top of my lungs

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Tell me, is He good? (He's good) Tell me, is He God? (He's God) He is good God Almighty

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You say Your love goes on forever, that Your mercy never stops So why would I assume You'd be somebody that You're not Like sun in the morning, I know You're gonna be there every day So what on earth could make me be afraid? (Afraid)

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Tell me, is He good? (He's good) Tell me, is He God? (He's God) He is good God almighty

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Praise Him in the morning Praise Him in the noontime Praise Him when the sun goes down Love Him in the morning Love Him in the noontime Love Him when the sun goes down

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Good God almighty I hope You'll find me (hope You'll find me) Praising Your name no matter what comes (no matter what comes) 'Cause I know where I'd be without Your mercy So I keep praising Your name at the top of my lungs Tell me, is He good? (He's good) Tell me, is He God? (He's God) He is good God almighty

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Jesus in the morning Jesus in the noontime Jesus when the sun goes down Jesus in the morning Jesus in the noontime Jesus when the sun goes down
